ads.headline: Service businesses seeing 40% better ROAS with video over static ads
actions: Shoot one 15-second video of you actually doing the service work today
Split your $25/day budget: test video creative against your best static ad
Track which creative wins by Friday, then pause the loser and scale winner
ads.source: r/FacebookAds weekly performance thread - service provider consensus

creative.headline: POV-style talking head hooks outperforming every other format this week
actions: Open with: 'POV: you just spent $500 on ads and got zero leads — here's the exact reason why'
Film a 30s talking head: start mid-sentence like you're already explaining something urgent. No intro. No 'hey guys'. Straight into the pain point. End with DM me ADS.
Avoid posting carousels this week — algorithmic reach for static posts is down, Reels are getting 3-5x more distribution

critic.headline: Meta Conversion API tracking breaking after iOS updates
actions: Verify your Conversion API pixel is firing correctly by checking server-side event logs in Events Manager
Go to Events Manager → your pixel → check 'Test Events' tool and send a test conversion to confirm it's being received
Look for a sudden drop in reported conversions starting 3-5 days ago while website traffic stayed flat—that's your signal tracking broke
critic.source: Meta ads community forums and Meta Business Suite reports this week

competitors.headline: No one is teaching service businesses HOW to respond to leads from ads
actions: Uncovered angle: competitors teach how to get leads but never what to say when the lead comes in — film 'exact script I tell my clients to use when someone fills in the form'
Pain point from this week: 'I got leads from my ads but none of them booked' — hook: 'You got leads but nobody booked. Here is exactly why and how to fix it in one message'
Top accounts posting 3-4x per week minimum with one Reel hitting 10k+ views acting as top of funnel — post volume is the differentiator right now
